query: WWDC26 Apple Intelligence onscreen awareness web answers conversation history app Siri AI feature details June 2026

mako.raw:
{"query":"WWDC26 Apple Intelligence onscreen awareness web answers conversation history app Siri AI feature details June 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1346,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2026/06/apple-unveils-next-generation-of-apple-intelligence-siri-ai-and-more/","title":"Apple unveils next generation of Apple Intelligence, Siri AI, and more - Apple","content":"Apple Intelligence is available with support for these languages: English, Danish, Dutch, French, German, Italian, Norwegian, Portuguese, Spanish, Swedish, Turkish, Vietnamese, Chinese (simplified), Chinese (traditional), Japanese, and Korean.
Apple Intelligence and Siri AI in iOS 27, iPadOS 27, macOS 27, watchOS 27, and visionOS 27 are available on iPhone 16 models or later, iPhone 15 Pro, iPhone 15 Pro Max, iPad mini (A17 Pro), iPad models with M1 or later, MacBook Neo (A18 Pro), Mac with M1 or later, Apple Vision Pro, Apple Watch Series 9 or later, Apple Watch Ultra 2 or later, and Apple Watch SE 3 when paired with an Apple Intelligence-enabled iPhone nearby.
Testing conducted by Apple in April and May 2026 using iPad Pro 11-inch (M4) with iPadOS 26.4.2 and prerelease iPadOS 27, and an APFS-formatted USB4 external SSD drive."},{"url":"https://www.apple.com/apple-intelligence/","title":"Apple Intelligence and Siri - Apple","content":"New Apple Intelligence features coming this fall.
A dedicated app brings together all your conversations in one place, so you can ask a question on your iPhone and pick up where you left off on your iPad.
VoiceOver describes your physical surroundings and onscreen content in richer detail.
Apple Intelligence in the Home app unlocks new capabilities, like combining related activity notifications,7 describing what happened in a selection of HomeKit Secure Video footage before you watch,8 and using AI to search for a clip based on what happened.9"},{"url":"http://martiancraft.com/blog/2026/06/wwdc-26-recap-siri-grows-up-apple-intelligence-goes-everywhere-and-agents-move-Into-xcode/","title":"WWDC26 Recap: Siri Grows Up, Apple Intelligence Goes Everywhere, and Agents Move into Xcode","content":"And updates to app intents let you wire your app into Siri AI’s personal context, app actions, and onscreen awareness, so your app’s content and capabilities become discoverable across the system.
On performance, Apple cites apps launching up to 30% faster, photos loading up to 70% faster after capture, AirDrop up to 80% faster, and browsing external drives on iPad up to 5x faster — roughly Finder-on-Mac territory.
Because of the EU’s Digital Markets Act, Siri AI will not ship in the European Union on iOS 27 and iPadOS 27 when the updates arrive this fall — and there’s currently no timeline for it."},{"url":"https://www.theneuron.ai/explainer-articles/everything-ai-apple-announced-at-wwdc-2026/","title":"Apple WWDC 2026 AI announcements: Siri AI and more | The Neuron","content":"Well, WWDC26 was Apple’s reset.
Watch the WWDC 2026 keynote below.
The new Siri app gives you a conversation history, lets you revisit past responses, and privately syncs those conversations through iCloud.
Evaluations, so developers can test whether AI features behave correctly across changing conditions.
Siri world-knowledge demo, on-screen awareness demo, and personal-context demo: Siri combines web knowledge, screen context, and messages.
(0:39:56) Demo: Siri answers a World Cup schedule question, then expands into a richer conversational planning interface.
(0:46:12) The Siri app shows conversation history that syncs privately through iCloud across iPhone, iPad, and Mac.
(1:02:12) Apple is bringing Image Playground into contact posters and Lock Screen wallpapers.
(1:07:01) Apple says the new Apple Intelligence app features will be free with the latest software releases."},{"url":"https://developer.apple.com/wwdc26/guides/apple-intelligence/","title":"WWDC26 Apple Intelligence guide - Apple Developer","content":"The new View Annotations API adds on-screen awareness on top of all of this, letting you map your views to entities so people can reference and act on what's right in front of them conversationally."}]}

{"query":"WWDC26 Apple Intelligence onscreen awareness web answers conversation history app Siri AI feature details June 2026","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2026/06/apple-introduces-siri-ai-a-profoundly-more-capable-and-personal-assistant","title":"Apple introduces Siri AI, a profoundly more capable and ...","content":"A collection of Apple products, including Apple Vision Pro, MacBook, iPad, iPhone 17 Pro, and Apple Watch, all displaying various interfaces. In Apple Maps on iPhone 17 Pro, Siri AI puts together a plan for a user’s visit to New York. In Messages on iPhone 17 Pro, Siri AI makes suggestions for what a user should name a friend’s new pet. A user’s conversation history is shown in the new dedicated Siri app on iPhone 17 Pro. A profoundly more capable and conversational assistant with personal context understanding, broad world knowledge, and onscreen awareness, Siri AI can help users find what they need in the moment, from answering questions from the web on virtually any topic, to surfacing relevant information from a user’s personal messages, emails, photos, and more. This new version of Siri is built on Apple Intelligence, allowing Siri to draw on personal context understanding and help users find what they need in the moment across messages, emails, photos, and Recap: Siri Grows Up, Apple Intelligence Goes Everywhere, and Agents Move into Xcode","content":"Every June, Apple’s Worldwide Developers Conference gives us a look at the road ahead — the place where the hardware we know meets the software we’re about to build. At MartianCraft, we’ve been shipping apps on Apple’s platforms since the earliest days of Mac OS X and iPhone OS, so we always settle in for the keynote with a notebook and a strong cup of coffee, our Susan Kare-designed blanket, and our Throwboy Mac pillow. This year’s headline is unmistakable: The long-promised, deeply personal Siri finally arrives as Siri AI, and the next generation of Apple Intelligence spreads into nearly every app you touch. For those of us who write the apps, there’s an equally big story in the developer tools — new AI frameworks, on-device model support, and agentic coding baked right into Xcode. ## Siri AI: The Assistant We’ve Been Waiting For. Siri AI is not a coat of paint on the old assistant — it’s a rebuild from the ground up, with Apple Intelligence at its core.","score":0.7099254,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hF8swzNR1-o","title":"Apple WWDC 2026 June 8: Introducing Siri AI and more","content":"Apple WWDC 2026 June 8: Introducing Siri AI and more

8 Jun 2026
Watch the WWDC26 keynote introducing Siri AI powered by Apple Intelligence — our most personal Siri update ever. You’ll also learn about expanded trust and safety features, and improvements to iOS 27, iPadOS 27, macOS 27, watchOS 27, visionOS 27, and tvOS 27.

To watch the event interpreted in American Sign Language (ASL) or hear it narrated via Audio Descriptions, please click here: https://youtu.be/QTL_we3HspI

Tune in to the Platforms State of the Union livestream here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yl2jsIoMfDU

For more on the Apple Worldwide Developers Conference, click here: https://apple.co/4fbes5F

Subscribe to the Apple Developer channel to stay up to date on the latest Apple software, technologies, and platforms: https://www.youtube.com/@UCwrVwiJllwhJUKXKmjLcckQ

00:05:04 Platform improvements
00:16:56 Trust and safety
00:27:53 Apple Intelligence and Siri
